title: kiluho's Keystrokes
description: Worlds most advanced and user-customizable keystrokes mod
body:
When I'm missing features in other mods that I want, I just make the mod myself! All keystrokes mods I could find only had WASD and the mouse buttons, but I wanted more movement buttons, so here it is! [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/YouTube-FF0000?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube )](https://youtube.com/@kiluhoMC) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Twitter-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=x )](https://x.com/kiluhoMC) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-24292e?style=for-the-badge&logo=github )](https://github.com/kiluho/) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support_me_on_Ko--fi-202020?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=FF6433 )](https://ko-fi.com/kiluho) ---

## 🅱️ Beta Preview kiluho's Keystrokes version 2.0.0 is coming! You can test the current beta release [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/kiluhos-keystrokes/versions). This major update introduces: - More intuitive position changing - Ability to create completely custom keystrokes layouts - Advanced color pickers ## 💾 Download ![Static Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/kiluhos-keystrokes?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=4FA25E) kiluho's Keystrokes is supported for **1.21** and higher. The mod requires the following mods: - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (for the configuration) View this mod on ↗ CurseForge ## 💡 Feedback I really appreciate feedback or suggestions regarding this mod! You can submit ideas using the **suggestion form** [here](https://github.com/kiluho/kiluhos-Keystrokes/issues). If you have any feedback or wanna talk about the mod, feel free to either [ping me on Twitter](https://x.com/intent/tweet?text=Hey%20@kiluhoMC%20&related=kiluhoMC) or use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/kiluho/kiluhos-Keystrokes/discussions).
